---
title: Projects
---

Here are some past an ongoing projects:

**[Strategic Interactions in Foreign Aid Games - Pousse, Pereira, Sharma (2024)](Projects_file/Micro2_grouppaper.qmd)** 



**[Presentation of the Auclert, Bardóczy, Rognlie (2023) paper on "MPCs, MPEs and Multipliers: A Trilemma for New Keynesian Models"](Projects_file/Macro2_presentation.qmd).**



**[UG POL3226 Research Essay - Campaign Contributions and Congressional Voting Behaviour in the US](Projects_file/UG_Pol3226.qmd)**
